WORKFLOW:
1. Read progress.txt and identify the most important and pending single task
2. If NO pending tasks exist, output exactly: <promise>FINISHED</promise> and stop
3. If there is a task:

   d. Review output and consider improvements
   e. Implement corrections if needed
   f. Update progress.txt marking task as completed
   g. Commit changes
   h. Stop

# CRITICAL: 
- If all tasks are completed, you MUST output: <promise>FINISHED</promise>;
- If more work is necessary, add a new task to the file and Stop;
- The first thing you MUST do is write your understanding of each WORKFLOW statement;
- The second thing you MUST do is write your understanding of the work in progress described in progress.txt;

1‚Üí# Frontend Style Guide ‚Äî Sem Parar (Zustand-only + Hook Component Pattern)
     2‚Üí
     3‚ÜíWelcome to the **Sem Parar Frontend Style Guide**.  
     4‚ÜíThis version consolidates: **Zustand as the only state manager**, **Hook Component pattern** for Screens and Atomic components, **services architecture (SOLID)**, and an **cache pattern**.
     5‚Üí
     6‚Üí> Sit down, have a cup of coffee and read this calmly. ‚òï
     7‚Üí
     8‚Üí---
     9‚Üí
    10‚Üí## :pushpin: Table of Contents
    11‚Üí- [Introduction](#introduction)
    12‚Üí- [Components & Screens ‚Äî Hook Component Pattern](#components--screens--hook-component-pattern)
    13‚Üí- [Atomic Components ‚Äî Hook Component Pattern](#atomic-components--hook-component-pattern)
    14‚Üí- [Project Organization](#project-organization)
    15‚Üí- [Services Architecture](#services-architecture)
    16‚Üí- [State Management (Zustand-only)](#state-management-zustand-only)
    17‚Üí- [Routes Naming](#routes-naming)
    18‚Üí- [Folder Naming Rules](#folder-naming-rules)
    19‚Üí- [Code Standards](#code-standards)
    20‚Üí- [Styles Patterns](#styles-patterns)
    21‚Üí- [Cache Pattern](#cache-pattern)
    22‚Üí- [Checklist](#checklist)
    23‚Üí
    24‚Üí---
    25‚Üí
    26‚Üí## Introduction
    27‚Üí
    28‚ÜíThe goal of this guide is to ensure **consistency, testability and scalability** across our frontend projects.  
    29‚Üí
    30‚ÜíKey decisions:
    31‚Üí- **Zustand** is the **exclusive** global/shared state manager.
    32‚Üí- UI follows the **Hook Component** pattern (logic hook + dumb view).
    33‚Üí- Domain logic lives in **`/services`** with **SOLID** layering.
    34‚Üí- Cache is **typed and reusable**.
    35‚Üí
    36‚Üí---
    37‚Üí
    38‚Üí## Components & Screens ‚Äî Hook Component Pattern
    39‚Üí
    40‚ÜíEach screen is split into a logic hook and a render-only component.
    41‚Üí
    42‚Üí```
    43‚Üíscreens/Home/
    44‚Üí‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ index.ts        # logic: export useHomeScreen()
    45‚Üí‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ view.tsx        # render: export default HomeScreen
    46‚Üí‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ Models/
    47‚Üí    ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ index.d.ts    # types (Props, State, Handlers, Return)
    48‚Üí```
    49‚Üí
    50‚Üí**Models/index.d.ts**
    51‚Üí```ts
    52‚Üíexport interface HomeParams {
    53‚Üí  welcome?: string;
    54‚Üí}
    55‚Üíexport interface HomeState {
    56‚Üí  greeting: string;
    57‚Üí  isLoading: boolean;
    58‚Üí}
    59‚Üíexport interface HomeHandlers {
    60‚Üí  onPressCTA: () => void;
    61‚Üí}
    62‚Üíexport type UseHomeReturn = HomeState & HomeHandlers;
    63‚Üí```
    64‚Üí
    65‚Üí**index.ts (logic hook)**
    66‚Üí```ts
    67‚Üíimport { useCallback, useMemo, useState, useEffect } from "react";
    68‚Üíimport type { HomeParams, UseHomeReturn } from "./Models";
    69‚Üíimport { useUserStore } from "@/services/user/store"; // Zustand slice example
    70‚Üí
    71‚Üíexport function useHomeScreen(params?: HomeParams): UseHomeReturn {
    72‚Üí  const name = useUserStore((s) => s.name);
    73‚Üí  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(true);
    74‚Üí
    75‚Üí  useEffect(() => {
    76‚Üí    const t = setTimeout(() => setIsLoading(false), 300);
    77‚Üí    return () => clearTimeout(t);
    78‚Üí  }, []);
    79‚Üí
    80‚Üí  const greeting = useMemo(
    81‚Üí    () => params?.welcome ?? `Hello, ${name || "guest"}!`,
    82‚Üí    [params?.welcome, name]
    83‚Üí  );
    84‚Üí
    85‚Üí  const onPressCTA = useCallback(() => {
    86‚Üí    // Call services, analytics, navigation, etc.
    87‚Üí  }, []);
    88‚Üí
    89‚Üí  return { greeting, isLoading, onPressCTA };
    90‚Üí}
    91‚Üí```
    92‚Üí
    93‚Üí**view.tsx (render)**
    94‚Üí```tsx
    95‚Üíimport React from "react";
    96‚Üíimport { View } from "react-native";
    97‚Üíimport { Text, Button } from "@semparar/design-system-app";
    98‚Üíimport { useHomeScreen } from "./index";
    99‚Üíimport type { HomeParams } from "./Models";
   100‚Üí
   101‚Üítype Props = HomeParams;
   102‚Üí
   103‚Üíexport default function HomeScreen(props: Props) {
   104‚Üí  const { greeting, isLoading, onPressCTA } = useHomeScreen(props);
   105‚Üí
   106‚Üí  if (isLoading) {
   107‚Üí    return (
   108‚Üí      <View>
   109‚Üí        <Text>Loading...</Text>
   110‚Üí      </View>
   111‚Üí    );
   112‚Üí  }
   113‚Üí
   114‚Üí  return (
   115‚Üí    <View>
   116‚Üí      <Text>{greeting}</Text>
   117‚Üí      <Button onPress={onPressCTA} text="Continue" />
   118‚Üí    </View>
   119‚Üí  );
   120‚Üí}
   121‚Üí```
   122‚Üí
   123‚Üí---
   124‚Üí
   125‚Üí## Atomic Components ‚Äî Hook Component Pattern
   126‚Üí
   127‚Üí```
   128‚Üíatomic/atoms/Button/
   129‚Üí‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ index.ts        # logic: export useButton()
   130‚Üí‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ view.tsx        # render: export default Button
   131‚Üí‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ Models/
   132‚Üí    ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ index.d.ts
   133‚Üí```
   134‚Üí
   135‚Üí**Models/index.d.ts**
   136‚Üí```ts
   137‚Üíexport interface ButtonProps {
   138‚Üí  text: string;
   139‚Üí  disabled?: boolean;
   140‚Üí  onPress?: () => void;
   141‚Üí}
   142‚Üíexport interface ButtonState {
   143‚Üí  pressed: boolean;
   144‚Üí}
   145‚Üíexport interface ButtonHandlers {
   146‚Üí  handlePress: () => void;
   147‚Üí}
   148‚Üíexport type UseButtonReturn = ButtonState & ButtonHandlers;
   149‚Üí```
   150‚Üí
   151‚Üí**index.ts (logic hook)**
   152‚Üí```ts
   153‚Üíimport { useCallback, useState } from "react";
   154‚Üíimport type { ButtonProps, UseButtonReturn } from "./Models";
   155‚Üí
   156‚Üíexport function useButton(props: ButtonProps): UseButtonReturn {
   157‚Üí  const [pressed, setPressed] = useState(false);
   158‚Üí
   159‚Üí  const handlePress = useCallback(() => {
   160‚Üí    setPressed(true);
   161‚Üí    props.onPress?.();
   162‚Üí    setTimeout(() => setPressed(false), 150);
   163‚Üí  }, [props.onPress]);
   164‚Üí
   165‚Üí  return { pressed, handlePress };
   166‚Üí}
   167‚Üí```
   168‚Üí
   169‚Üí**view.tsx (render)**
   170‚Üí```tsx
   171‚Üíimport React from "react";
   172‚Üíimport { Pressable, View } from "react-native";

   189‚Üí
   190‚Üí---
   191‚Üí
   192‚Üí## Project Organization
   193‚Üí
   194‚Üí```
   195‚Üísrc/
   196‚Üí‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ @types/            # Global TS types
   197‚Üí‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ assets/            # Images, fonts, icons
   198‚Üí‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ atomic/            # UI components (Hook Component pattern)
   199‚Üí‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ atoms/

   201‚Üí‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ organisms/
   202‚Üí‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ modules/           # Microfrontends shared and native modules
   203‚Üí‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ screens/           # Page-level (Hook Component pattern)
   204‚Üí‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ services/          # Domain logic (SOLID layout)

   208‚Üí‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ repository/    # Data abstraction & mapping
   209‚Üí‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ services/      # Business orchestration
   210‚Üí‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ storage/       # Storage orchestration with cache or not

   214‚Üí‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ index.ts       # Public exports
   215‚Üí‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ hooks/             # Cross-cutting React hooks

   222‚Üí
   223‚Üí---
   224‚Üí
   225‚Üí## Services Architecture
   226‚Üí
   227‚Üí**Flow:** `UI ‚Üí services ‚Üí repository ‚Üí api` and `UI ‚Üí services ‚Üí store (Zustand)`
   228‚Üí
   229‚Üí- **api/**: request clients; no domain logic.  
   230‚Üí- **class/**: class with logical requests.  
   231‚Üí- **hooks/**: specific service hooks.
   232‚Üí- **repository/**: maps transport to domain, aggregates sources.  
   233‚Üí- **services/**: orchestration and business rules.  
   234‚Üí- **storage/**: storage orchestration with cache or not.  
   235‚Üí- **store/**: Zustand slices (single source of app state).  
   236‚Üí- **models/**: types, DTOs, contracts.  
   237‚Üí- **utils/**: reusable service helpers.
   238‚Üí
   239‚ÜíPrinciples:
   240‚Üí- Single responsibility per folder/file.
   241‚Üí- No circular dependencies.
   242‚Üí- Public APIs exported via `services/index.ts` per domain.
   243‚Üí
   244‚Üí---
   245‚Üí
   246‚Üí## State Management (Zustand-only)
   247‚Üí
   248‚Üí- All global/shared state is **Zustand**.  
   249‚Üí- Slices live under `/services/<domain>/store/`.  
   250‚Üí- Use `persist` (with `createJSONStorage`) only when needed.  
   251‚Üí- Keep setters pure; side effects go in hooks or services.
   252‚Üí
   253‚Üí**Slice example**
   254‚Üí```ts
   255‚Üíimport type { StateCreator } from "zustand";
   256‚Üíimport type { AuthActions, AuthState } from "../models/store";
   257‚Üí
   258‚Üíexport type AuthSlice = {
   259‚Üí    auth: AuthState;
   260‚Üí    authActions: AuthActions
   261‚Üí};
   262‚Üí
   263‚Üíconst initialAuth = {
   264‚Üí    user: null,
   265‚Üí    loading: false,
   266‚Üí    error: undefined,
   267‚Üí}
   268‚Üí
   269‚Üíexport const createAuthSlice: StateCreator<AuthSlice, [], [], AuthSlice> = (set) => ({
   270‚Üí    auth: initialAuth,
   271‚Üí    authActions: {
   272‚Üí        setLoading: (v) => set((s) => ({ auth: { ...s.auth, isLoading: v } })),
   273‚Üí        setUser: (v) => set((s) => ({ auth: { ...s.auth, user: v } })),
   274‚Üí        setError: (v) => set((s) => ({ auth: { ...s.auth, error: v } })),
   275‚Üí        reset: () => set({ auth: initialAuth }),
   276‚Üí    }
   277‚Üí});
   278‚Üí```
   279‚Üí
   280‚Üí**Root Store**
   281‚Üí
   282‚Üí- Applies to ALL Sem Parar frontend apps ‚Äî including SuperApp.
   283‚Üí
   284‚Üí```ts
   285‚Üíimport { create } from "zustand";
   286‚Üíimport { devtools, persist, createJSONStorage } from "zustand/middleware";
   287‚Üíimport { immer } from "zustand/middleware/immer";
   288‚Üí
   289‚Üíimport { createUserSlice, type UserSlice } from "@semparar/mf-app-user/src/newArch/user";
   290‚Üíimport { createAuthSlice, type AuthSlice } from "@semparar/mf-app-yourmf";
   291‚Üí
   292‚Üíimport storage from "~/redux/store/storage";
   293‚Üí
   294‚Üí/** Add your slice Type */
   295‚Üíexport type RootStore = UserSlice & AuthSlice;
   296‚Üí
   297‚Üíexport const useRootStore = create<RootStore>()(
   298‚Üí  devtools(
   299‚Üí    persist(
   300‚Üí      immer((...a) => ({
   301‚Üí        ...createUserSlice(...a),
   302‚Üí        ...createAuthSlice(...a), // Add your slice here
   303‚Üí      })),
   304‚Üí      {
   305‚Üí        name: "root-storage",
   306‚Üí        storage: createJSONStorage(() => storage),
   307‚Üí        partialize: (s) => ({
   308‚Üí          user: s.user,
   309‚Üí          auth: s.auth, // Add your store data
   310‚Üí        }),
   311‚Üí        merge: (persisted, current) => ({ ...current, ...(persisted as Partial<RootStore>) }),
   312‚Üí      }
   313‚Üí    ),
   314‚Üí    { name: "RootStore" }
   315‚Üí  )
   316‚Üí);
   317‚Üí```
   318‚Üí
   319‚Üí- For Use on Class.
   320‚Üí
   321‚Üí```ts
   322‚Üíclass Auth {
   323‚Üí  private readonly setAuth;
   324‚Üí
   325‚Üí  constructor () {
   326‚Üí    this.setUser = useRootStore.getState().authActions.setUser;
   327‚Üí  }
   328‚Üí
   329‚Üí  function doSomething(data) {
   330‚Üí    this.setUser({ ...data });
   331‚Üí  }
   332‚Üí}
   333‚Üí```
   334‚Üí
   335‚Üí- For Use on Component/Screen.
   336‚Üí- UI never imports the store directly ‚Äî uses selectors
   337‚Üí
   338‚Üí```ts
   339‚Üíconst loading = useRootStore((s) => s.user.isLoading);
   340‚Üíconst token = useRootStore((s) => s.auth.token);
   341‚Üí```
   342‚Üí
   343‚Üí---
   344‚Üí
   345‚Üí## Routes Naming
   346‚Üí
   347‚ÜíStandardize as **`Acronym + Route`**:  
   348‚Üí- ‚úÖ `SPPayment` (Sem Parar Payment)  
   349‚Üí- ‚úÖ `FTHPayment` (Fintech Payment)
   350‚Üí
   351‚Üí---
   352‚Üí
   353‚Üí## Folder Naming Rules
   354‚Üí
   355‚Üí| Folder                              | Convention   | Examples                    |
   356‚Üí|-------------------------------------|--------------|-----------------------------|
   357‚Üí| `atomic`, `screens`, `routes`       | `PascalCase` | `HomeScreen`, `CarDetails`  |
   358‚Üí| `assets`, `hooks`, `services`, etc. | `camelCase`  | `useAuth`, `authService`    |
   359‚Üí
   360‚Üí---
   361‚Üí
   362‚Üí## Code Standards
   363‚Üí
   364‚Üí**Language**: English only.  
   365‚Üí**Naming**: `camelCase` (vars/functions), `PascalCase` (components/classes), `UPPER_SNAKE_CASE` (constants).
   366‚Üí
   367‚Üí**Explanatory variables**  
   368‚Üí```js
   369‚Üíconst onlyNumbersRegex = /^\d+$/;
   370‚Üíconst getNumberValidation = (message) => (value) => !onlyNumbersRegex.test(value) && message;
   371‚Üíconst isNumber = getNumberValidation("error message");
   372‚ÜíisNumber(1);
   373‚Üí```
   374‚Üí
   375‚Üí**Semantic constants**  
   376‚Üí```js
   377‚Üíconst DAY_IN_MILLISECONDS = 86400000;
   378‚ÜísetTimeout(doSomething, DAY_IN_MILLISECONDS);
   379‚Üí```
   380‚Üí
   381‚Üí**Library workarounds with link**  
   382‚Üí```js
   383‚Üí// Refer to issue https://github.com/ngokevin/react-file-reader-input/issues/11#issuecomment-363484861
   384‚Üí// eslint-disable-next-line no-param-reassign
   385‚Üíevent.target.value = "";
   386‚Üí```
   387‚Üí
   388‚Üí**JSDoc**  
   389‚Üí```js
   390‚Üí/**
   391‚Üí * Truncates an event name to the max length.
   392‚Üí * @param {*} eventName
   393‚Üí * @param {*} maxLength
   394‚Üí */
   395‚Üí```
   396‚Üí
   397‚Üí**Hooks: multi-line deps & IIFE**  
   398‚Üí```ts
   399‚ÜíuseEffect(() => {
   400‚Üí  (async () => {
   401‚Üí    await CustomMath.randomSum();
   402‚Üí    setSum(42);
   403‚Üí  })();
   404‚Üí}, [
   405‚Üí  setSum,
   406‚Üí]);
   407‚Üí```
   408‚Üí
   409‚Üí**Extract conditions**  
   410‚Üí```ts
   411‚Üíconst hasSelectedOffer = !!(selectedProduct || selectedLeasingOffer);
   412‚Üíif (!hasSelectedOffer && !individualOffer) return;
   413‚Üí```
   414‚Üí
   415‚Üí**Optional chaining**  
   416‚Üí```ts
   417‚Üíconst answers = formikForm?.values?.answers;
   418‚Üí```
   419‚Üí
   420‚Üí**JSX indentation**  
   421‚Üí```tsx
   422‚Üí{
   423‚Üí  !isEnd && (
   424‚Üí    <Button text="CTA" onPress={handleNavigate} />
   425‚Üí  )
   426‚Üí}
   427‚Üí```
   428‚Üí
   429‚Üí**Early returns**  
   430‚Üí```ts
   431‚Üíif (!data) return null;
   432‚Üíreturn <View />;
   433‚Üí```
   434‚Üí
   435‚Üí**Nullish coalescing**  
   436‚Üí```ts
   437‚Üíreturn data ?? 0;
   438‚Üí```
   439‚Üí---
   440‚Üí
   441‚Üí## Styles Patterns
   442‚Üí
   443‚Üí- Do **not** use `StyleSheet` or `styled-components`.  
   444‚Üí- Use **@semparar/design-system-app** for components, tokens, and theming.
   445‚Üí
   446‚Üí---
   447‚Üí
   448‚Üí## Cache Pattern
   449‚Üí
   450‚ÜíKeep cache typed, serializable, and domain.
   451‚Üí
   452‚Üí```ts
   453‚Üíimport storage from "~/redux/store/storage";
   454‚Üí
   455‚Üíexport interface CachedData<T> {
   456‚Üí  timestamp: number;
   457‚Üí  data: T;
   458‚Üí}
   459‚Üí
   460‚Üíexport interface StorageContract<T> {
   461‚Üí  get(): Promise<CachedData<T> | null>;
   462‚Üí  save(data: T): Promise<void>;
   463‚Üí  remove(): Promise<void>;
   464‚Üí}
   465‚Üí
   466‚Üíexport class GenericStorage<T> implements StorageContract<T> {
   467‚Üí  constructor(private readonly key: string) {}
   468‚Üí
   469‚Üí  async get(): Promise<CachedData<T> | null> {
   470‚Üí    const json = await storage.getItem(this.key);
   471‚Üí    if (!json) return null;
   472‚Üí    return JSON.parse(json) as CachedData<T>;
   473‚Üí  }
   474‚Üí
   475‚Üí  async save(data: T): Promise<void> {
   476‚Üí    const payload: CachedData<T> = { timestamp: Date.now(), data };
   477‚Üí    await storage.setItem(this.key, JSON.stringify(payload));
   478‚Üí  }
   479‚Üí
   480‚Üí  async remove(): Promise<void> {
   481‚Üí    await storage.removeItem(this.key);
   482‚Üí  }
   483‚Üí}
   484‚Üí```
   485‚Üí
   486‚Üí**Guidelines**
   487‚Üí- One storage class per module/feature.
   488‚Üí- Types/interfaces live in `Models/` where appropriate.
   489‚Üí- Use `timestamp` for freshness/expiry strategies.
   490‚Üí- Never persist secrets/PII outside secure storage.
   491‚Üí- Keep payloads small and JSON-serializable.
   492‚Üí
   493‚Üí---
   494‚Üí
   495‚Üí## Checklist
   496‚Üí
   497‚Üí- [ ] Screens/Components follow **Hook Component pattern** (`index.ts` hook + `view.tsx` render)
   498‚Üí- [ ] Types live in **Models/**
   499‚Üí- [ ] Only **Zustand** for global/shared state under **/services/<domain>/store/**
   500‚Üí- [ ] UI never calls API directly (go through **/services**)
   501‚Üí- [ ] Code standards and styles patterns applied
   502‚Üí- [ ] Cache implemented via **GenericStorage** (when needed)
   503‚Üí- [ ] Routes and folder naming conventions followed
   504‚Üí
   505‚Üí---
   506‚Üí
   507‚ÜíHappy shipping! üöÄ

================================================================================

1. INFRASTRUCTURE WAS CREATED BUT SCREENS WERE NOT MIGRATED

   - This made the migration USELESS - data flows through Redux, not Zustand

2. TYPES WERE DUPLICATED UNNECESSARILY
